name: harris-boat-works-mercury
description: Mercury outboard motor specialist on Rice Lake, Ontario. Search live inventory, estimate trade-ins, and build itemized CAD quotes with deep-link handoff. Family-owned since 1947. Authorized Mercury Marine dealer since 1965 (60+ years). Authorized Legend Boats dealer for new pontoons/aluminum. Pickup-only at Gores Landing — we do not deliver. Verado is special-order only, not part of default inventory. Service radius ~150 km from Gores Landing (Toronto, Peterborough, Kawarthas, Cobourg, Belleville).

tools.name: search_motors
tools.description: Search current Mercury outboard inventory by HP, family (FourStroke / Pro XS / SeaPro / Racing), or stock status. Returns CAD pricing. Default inventory excludes Verado (Verado is special-order only — contact HBW directly for a Verado quote).

tools.name: get_motor
tools.description: Fetch a single Mercury motor by id or slug, including pricing, shaft length, and deep-link URL.

tools.name: estimate_trade_in
tools.description: Estimate trade-in value (CAD) for any outboard. Brand penalties apply (Mercury preferred; Yamaha/Honda neutral; Evinrude/Johnson/Force/Chrysler discounted).

tools.name: build_quote
tools.description: Build an itemized CAD quote (motor + installation + propeller + trade-in + HST + financing tier) and return a deep-link the customer can open. Optional contact captures a lead.

tools.name: get_brand_rules
tools.description: Authoritative source-of-truth: pricing currency, geography, Verado special-order policy, financing minimums, deposits, warranty.

examples.title: Find a Mercury 90 HP in stock
